ocr_findings.description: Section heading marker: image shows a distinct colored circle-dot icon before '引数のある関数' and '引数のある関数の定義'; OCR renders these as '◇' and '●' respectively — functionally equivalent but not matching image symbols exactly

reviewer_notes: Page covers function call flow diagram, the '宣言と定義の違い' sidebar, and the introduction to functions with arguments. The diagram is an image placeholder. All body text including the sidebar box content is correctly captured. The furigana 'ひきすう' appears as a separate OCR line (line 15) rather than inline ruby text, which is acceptable.
